## How to verify

Please list the reproduction and verification steps (including local command examples), and specify the path of newly added/updated test files:

Example commands:

```bash
# Build affected packages
pnpm -F @vureact/compiler-core build
pnpm -F @vureact/runtime-core build

# Run tests in the package (replace with actual package name)
pnpm -F @vureact/compiler-core test
pnpm -F @vureact/runtime-core test
```

## Notes

> After submitting the PR, please keep the branch in sync with the main branch and respond to review comments in a timely manner. Merging usually requires CI to pass and approval from at least one maintainer/reviewer. Thank you for your contribution! 🙏
